metadata.description: KISA-based security vulnerability assessment skills. Supports CII (Critical Information Infrastructure) with 560+ items, the AI Security Guide, and Robot Security checklists. Technical, administrative, and physical security evaluation based on Korean KISA guidelines and related standards.

plugins.name: kesekit-en
plugins.description: Security vulnerability assessment skills (English). start(full CII + AI + Robot security audit), check(compliance pre-deployment checklist), fix(auto-fix with hardening scripts), guide(secure coding prompts for AI tools). Supports CII infrastructure (560+ items), the AI Security Guide, and Robot Security checklists.

plugins.name: kesekit-ko
plugins.description: 보안 취약점 분석평가 스킬 (한국어). start(CII + AI + 로봇 보안 전체 감사), check(컴플라이언스 배포 전 체크리스트), fix(취약점 자동 수정 + 하드닝 스크립트), guide(AI 도구용 시큐어코딩 프롬프트 생성). 주요정보통신기반시설(560+항목), AI 보안 안내서, 로봇 보안 체크리스트를 지원합니다.
